name: BLADE
description: Half-human and half-vampire, Eric Brooks walks betweenworlds, craving the very life force of his enemies. As nightfalls, Blade's hunt begins as he wields the Sword of Draculato become the nightmare of any foe who dares to bare theirfangs.
lore: Eric Brooks was born a Daywalker — half-human, half-vampire — because his mother was bitten by a vampire while Eric was still in her womb. His supernatural powers and mastery of weapons made him the perfect vampire hunter — Blade. When Dracula took over New York City, Blade was the first hero to confront him. Having mastered the power of the Chronovium, Dracula defeated Blade and imprisoned him in a dungeon. After Blade was freed, he was sent to Wakanda to recover… until Shuri recruited him as her most powerful ally against Knull!

abilities.name: Ancestral Sword
abilities.description: Slash forward with Blade's Ancestral Sword

stats.Damage: Cause 26 damage per single slash; double strike cause 13 damage per hit

abilities.name: Hunter's Shotgun
abilities.description: Fire at enemies using your Shotgun

stats.Casting: Projectile that fires in a straight trajectory, which breaks into shrapnel after reaching a certain distance
stats.Shrapnel Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 15m, decreasing to 50% at 30m

abilities.name: Scarlet Shroud
abilities.description: Parry with Ancestral Sword to become Unstoppable for a brief period, reducing damage taken from the front and decreasing the cooldown of Daywalker Dash

stats.Special Effect: Every 200 damage resisted grants 1 charge for Daywalker Dash

abilities.name: Bloodline Awakening
abilities.description: Awaken the Dhampir bloodline, enhancing slash speed during continuous attacks and triggering Whirlwind Slash.If all Whirlwind Slash strikes hit, your Attack Speed will further increase. While under this state, you suffer Reduced Healing, but attacks gain Lifesteal

stats.Special Effect: Landing all four hits of Whirlwind Slash grants 1 slash speed stack; Excess lifesteal grants Bonus Health( max 75; conversion rate 50%)

abilities.name: Daywalker Dash
abilities.description: Dash forward. If wielding your gun, shoot at enemies upon impact, applying a Healing Reduction effect. If wielding your sword, deliver a cleaving strike that inflicts Slow

stats.Casting: Dash. Cause damage and special effects to the enemies hit
stats.Special Effect: Hit while wielding the gun, inflict Slow effect to the enemy; hit while wielding the sword, deal Healing Reduction to the enemy
stats.Healing Reduction Proportion: apply 8% Healing Reduction per strike (32% total if all hit)

abilities.name: Thousand-Fold Slash
abilities.description: Charge power and swiftly draw the Sword of Dracula, executing a powerful Iaido strike as you dash forward, leaving behind a slashing zone where the sword automatically strikes enemies. Enemies hit suffer Reduced Healing

stats.Spell Field Range: Length: Maximum dash distance; Width: 6m; Height: 4.5m

received.name: ECLIPSE EDGE
received.description: Blessed by Khonshu, Blade gains a new ability. When activated, Blade swings his Ancestral Sword in a powerful slash, dashing forward a short distance. At the end of the dash, he swiftly slashes four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets

base.description: Perform a heavy forward cleave with the Ancestral Sword while performing a short dash. At the end of the dash, swiftly slash four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Moon Knight, each Whirlwind Slash triggered generates one additional Darkmoon Blade.

stats.Special Effect: Each Whirlwind Slash generates an additional Crescent Blade

base.description: For every set amount of damage taken, Blade builds a stack of Bloodline Awakening.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Captain America, taking critical damage instantly triggers the Bloodline Awakening state, gaining bonus stacks while raising the overall stack cap.
